body:
* Updates docs
* Provides option `forced_fixed_iters` that iterates for a fixed number of iterations. 
* Verified that `maxiter = 3` gives temperature accuracy better than 0.1 K (typically 1e-5 K).
title: Updates docs and provides branchless GPU path

body: This is behavior changing but working in current AMIP: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/741#_. So I made it a patch release.
title: bump patch version
